title: PersianIdioBench: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Persian Idiom Understanding and Generation
description: PersianIdioBench is a publicly released benchmark for evaluating NLP systems on Persian idiomatic expressions. It comprises 4,352 deduplicated idioms compiled from web dictionaries, encyclopedic entries, educational resources, and previously published academic collections, with a gold-standard layer of evaluative-polarity annotation (Cohen's kappa = 0.68). The benchmark defines three tasks: Connotation Classification, Appropriateness in Context, and Cloze-Style Idiom Selection.
